productDisplayName: Doodle Boy Grand Prix Navy Blue Shirt
description: Composition Navy blue shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves and fold over hems, tipped collar with a checked tape inseam, front buttoned placket with checked inner lining, pocket on left chest with checked lining, and has graphic print on the right chest and back Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed Do not iron on print Encourage the motor sport spirit in your little boy with this Grand Prix shirt from doodle. The checks add a hint of smartness to this shirt, while the fabric keeps him fresh and comfortable all day. Team it with trousers and sneakers for that smart look.
